title: Under The Light of a Full Moon
author: D.A. McGrath
description: Meet Clara. An ordinary girl with an extraordinary secret… Clara doesn’t think she’s special, until she starts having terrifying nightmares and hearing voices in the night. Then her great aunt, Selina, tells Clara something incredible. Clara’s a shape-shifter. But with this extraordinary, inherited gift comes a dangerous curse. Clara thinks Selina’s crazy and dismisses her great aunt’s warnings but, no matter how hard she tries, the curse cannot be escaped. Will Clara accept her fate and learn t
